arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. Roma: Predicted XI for Europa League encounter
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up in their home clash against Roma in the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: 'I played 60 min at Etihad on broken ankle' - Spurs' Vicario has surgery
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario has surgery after playing 60 minutes with a broken ankle against Manchester City on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Roma - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Roma, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Tottenham identify Gugliemo Vicario replacement after injury blow
arts.sum: Tottenham chief Daniel Levy is reportedly eyeing Burnley sensation James Trafford or Sunderland's hot prospect Anthony Patterson for a January swoop as Spurs search for a stand-in for versatile Guglielmo Vicario . On Instagram, Vicario commented on his predicament: "I played 60 minutes at the Etihad with a broken bone in my ankle, giving absolutely everything I had for the team," he said.

arts.ttl: Roma’s new psychologist departs the club after just 20 Days
arts.sum: Tim Coates, the newly appointed psychologist for AS Roma, has left the club after a brief tenure of only 20 days. Coates joined the team at the beginning of the month on a trial basis, making his first appearance with the squad during their 3-2 loss to Bologna on November 10. Initially introduced to the club by Mark Sertori, Roma’s head of performance, Coates was set to have a contract that would extend until 2026.
